{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012226879B47DC0E740083BA51"}"},"total":26},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7589856498853069630","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"江湖中的恩怨情仇写得不错。感觉和女主到处吃瓜 [吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767154991,"group_id":"7548659554599308313","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"(^-^)/小小的人，大大的梦想","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxkPI2InZCxYU7BE6m7SL6Ym22rkivq3CkHPn8sud7ei","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bfc53d86b6674f84a07125414ad19541~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792405&x-signature=MJualV%2BJ0s6m66OqEGv0%2FdzwAwA%3D","user_id":"1974372260652734","user_name":"雅焕金"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1974372260652734","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548659554599308313","book_info":{"abstract":"      好友吐槽江璃可能没命看到《庆余年》第三季，一语成谶，江璃被高空抛人砸到，穿越了，魂穿到了一个古代平行世界。
      生辰当天，渣爹派人上门逼娘签和离书，气死爷爷，亲娘触壁而亡。 她决定去找渣爹，寻机报仇。
       都说人在江湖，身不由已，但拳头硬了，你说什么都有道理。
      她原以为这是个武侠的世界，拿的是快意江湖的剧本。后来才发现这是个可修仙的世界，自己练的不是武功，是修仙功法。
      自此，在凡人的江湖世界里活得恣意，等机缘巧合收集完五行功法，去到了广阔的修仙世界，却开始了苟活变强之路。
      （在我的设定中，人物修为就是游戏里人物的经验条，靠修炼灵力增加经验点，顿悟也可增加经验点。经验点满了就能升级，但一个大境界升另一个大境界就会出现卡级的现象，如炼气升筑基，要有契点才能冲破卡级的桎梏。灵力就是蓝条，灵力和内力有所不同，灵力是吸收灵气转化的，内力是自己修炼出来的，就象是能量条，而九阴九阳这两本功法书的设定，是修炼功法时能同时修灵力也能修内力。）
      （谢谢大家的支持！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/6fbb09713af7468a008d09d55c7a07f2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"步烟飞","author_id":"","book_id":"7548659554599308313","book_name":"闯江湖闯到修仙界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8b8c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548660991563661849","read_count":"751","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"705107"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"348","tags":"玄幻言情,古代言情,武侠,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/6fbb09713af7468a008d09d55c7a07f2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384146&x-signature=so8T4itqE3Z6%2FBdgned%2FdIeIS7s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1563952427050419","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"387"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012226879B47DC0E740083BA51"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":45045,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":79637,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":261},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1767934040,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7582948315278492440","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很精彩，故事情节既平淡，又引入入胜，值得一看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765545230,"group_id":"7548659554599308313","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2ebED1bMKKAhlNGHJFFRVc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"50027551336","user_name":"爱吃豉椒炒排骨的齐叔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50027551336","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548659554599308313","book_info":{"abstract":"      好友吐槽江璃可能没命看到《庆余年》第三季，一语成谶，江璃被高空抛人砸到，穿越了，魂穿到了一个古代平行世界。
      生辰当天，渣爹派人上门逼娘签和离书，气死爷爷，亲娘触壁而亡。 她决定去找渣爹，寻机报仇。
       都说人在江湖，身不由已，但拳头硬了，你说什么都有道理。
      她原以为这是个武侠的世界，拿的是快意江湖的剧本。后来才发现这是个可修仙的世界，自己练的不是武功，是修仙功法。
      自此，在凡人的江湖世界里活得恣意，等机缘巧合收集完五行功法，去到了广阔的修仙世界，却开始了苟活变强之路。
      （在我的设定中，人物修为就是游戏里人物的经验条，靠修炼灵力增加经验点，顿悟也可增加经验点。经验点满了就能升级，但一个大境界升另一个大境界就会出现卡级的现象，如炼气升筑基，要有契点才能冲破卡级的桎梏。灵力就是蓝条，灵力和内力有所不同，灵力是吸收灵气转化的，内力是自己修炼出来的，就象是能量条，而九阴九阳这两本功法书的设定，是修炼功法时能同时修灵力也能修内力。）
